entries.summary: Phase 1 Telegram Init Data Validation Implementation completed successfully
top_rejection_reasons: Test mocking required vi.stubEnv instead of vi.stubGlobal for Vite import.meta.env
lessons_learned: vi.stubGlobal does not work for Vite's import.meta.env - use vi.stubEnv instead
Module caching requires vi.resetModules() before re-importing after env changes
Fixed system time with vi.setSystemTime() for deterministic timestamp tests
